name: Intellect Cooling
desc: When Intellect reaches 300 points, skill CD -10%.

name: Rapid Thunder Assault
desc: For each additional Thunder Sigil consumed by a skill, damage +3%.

name: Instant Slash
desc: Instant Iaido Slash hitting the target reduces the target's Armor by 6% for 5s, stacking up to 5 layers.

name: Keen Strike
desc: Normal attacks have a fixed 10% chance to trigger Piercing Slash, effective at most once per second.

name: Blade Intent
desc: Gain 3 points of Blade Intent when releasing Expertise.

name: Thunder Charm Blade
desc: For each Thunder Sigil consumed by a Expertise Skill, gain an additional 3 points of Blade Intent.

name: Vacuum Slash
desc:
Each time Flash or Raijin Dash is cast, stack 1 layer of Thundrage. When Thundrage accumulates to 5 layers, Iaido Slash evolves into Thunder Cut.
After Casting Thunder Cut, consume 5 layers of Thundrage, Thundrage can stack up to 8 layers.

name: Blade Intent Thunder Strike
desc: When Iaido Slash deals Crit DMG, if the Blade Intent is greater than 20 points, trigger Thunder Strike (Iaido Slash can trigger only once per use).

name: Thunder Sigil Rewind
desc: When consuming Thunder Sigils, there is a chance to return 1 Thunder Sigil. For each additional Thunder Sigil consumed, the return chance +8%.

name: Keen Enhancement
desc: Fixed trigger chance of Piercing Slash +10%.

name: Iai Thunder Dance
desc: When Thunder Sigil is greater than or equal to 3, Special Attacks will attack twice consecutively.

name: Shadow Veil
desc: Each enemy within 3 meters increases Block chance by 3%, up to 15%. (Doubles the effect against Elite or stronger enemies.)

name: Stone Domain
desc:
throughout the duration of Sandshroud, being attacked reduces the attack speed of enemy targets within 5 meters by 30%, lasting for 3s.
throughout the duration of Sandshroud, Armor of friendly targets within 8 meters +10%.

name: Fang of the Alpha
desc: Reduces the DMG Elites or stronger enemies deal to you by 12%.

name: Sandy Shelter
desc: During Stoneform, gains Sandy Shelter for every 20 Rage accumulated.

name: Starfall
desc: For every 20 Sand Crystals consumed, Star Shatter evolves into Starfall.

name: Countercrush
desc:
Successful Block triggers Countercrush, once per second.
On Lucky Block, trigger Enhanced Countercrush, once per second.

name: Granite
desc: After Casting Stone Fist, summon 1 Granite every 2s for the next 6s.

name: Sandgrip
desc:
Reduces the CD of Sandstone Grasp by 15s.
After using Sandgrip, gains Countercrush.

name: Heart of Rock
desc:
After Casting Granite Fury 5 times, gain Rock Heart.
Rock Heart: For 10s, Granite Fury evolves into Stone Fist.

name: Sandstone Revival
desc: For every Sand Crystal consumed, recover 1% of Max HP.

name: Enhanced Weak Point Strike
desc: Increases the fixed chance to trigger Weak Point Strike by 10%.

name: Life Suppress
desc: Gains the effects of Suppress Expertise.

name: Weak Point Strike
desc: When dealing DMG, Basic Attacks have a fixed 10% chance to trigger Weak Point Strike.

name: Rage Awakening
desc: Consuming Rage has a chance to trigger Enraged. Each 1 Rage consumed grants 1% chance.

name: Valiant Fury
desc: During Enraged, increases Armor by 30%, yet it loses 5% per second.

name: Granite Combo
desc: Granite has a chance to summon an additional Granite, with the chance equal to Lucky Chance.

name: Arcane of Green
desc: When Feral Seed deals DMG, it increases the DMG dealt by Infusion, Wild Bloom, Deer Charge in the next 10s by 20%.

name: Pulse Breath
desc: If equipped with the Regen Pulse skill, Regen Pulse can be triggered whenever Nature Ward or Ultimate CD is completed.

name: Wild Protection
desc:
When the number of Regen Buds is greater than or equal to 6, Feral Seed consumes +2 Regen Buds, and the number of Wild Seeds thrown ++1.
When the number of Regen Buds is less than 6, Feral Seed gains an additional 10 energy.

name: Feral Seed Symbiosis
desc: When the number of active Symbiotic Marks is greater than or equal to 5, Feral Seed damage +100%.

name: Wide-area Thorns
desc: When Feral Seed hits a target affected by Thorns, it can spread the Thorns effect to other targets within 10 meters of the target.

name: Luck Damage
desc:
Lucky Strike damage +5%.
Each 1% Luck provides 1% Lucky Strike damage.

name: Energy Surge
desc: Every 2% Haste provides 1% energy natural recovery efficiency.

name: Dancing Seed
desc:
When a Expertise Skill that deals damage triggers a Lucky Strike, the number of Wild Seeds fired ++1.
For every 5 Nourishing Seeds thrown, the next throw of Nourishing Seeds will increase by +1.

name: Pulse Retrospect
desc:
When Regen Pulse reaches its maximum distance, it will return to your location.
Regen Pulse can now also deal damage to enemy targets.

name: Natural Bloom
desc: When healing an ally with lower than 30% HP, Natural Bloom triggers, instantly restoring HP equal to 200% ATK to them. This effect can occur up to once every 30s.

name: Verdant Blessing
desc:
When an inspired ally's HP drops below 20%, triggers the Blessing.
Blessing: Grants a Nature Shield and reduces the DMG taken by 35% for 8s. The effect can be triggered once every 60s.

name: Flourish
desc: When Infusion, Feral Seed, or Wild Bloom deals DMG, 30% chance to reduce the remaining CD of the Ultimate by 1s, occurring up to once per second.

name: Bud Acquisition
desc: When an enemy within 10 meters that you have attacked is defeated, an Engram Orb is generated. Picking it up grants 1 Regen Bud.

name: Symbiosis Extension
desc: Each time a Wild Seed is fired, the duration of active Symbiotic Marks is extended by 1s.

name: Stag Charge
desc:
After triggering a total of 10 Nourishing Seeds or Wild Seeds, Wild Bloom evolves into Stag Charge.
Casting Deer Charge instants grants 3 Regen Buds.

name: Pulse Echo
desc:
When Infusion deals damage, you gain 1 stack of Pulse Echo.
Pulse Echo: Regen Pulse damage +20%, lasts for 5s, stacks up to 5 times.

name: Double Infusion
desc: After casting Stag Charge, the number of channeling for the next Infusion +100%.

name: Shelter
desc: Within 5s after Casting Infusion, the Nature Shield added by Wild Bloom or Nature Ward absorbs double the damage.

name: Wings of Revival
desc:
When an ally within 20 meters takes DMG exceeding 30% of their HP, Revival triggers, which can affect the same target up to once every 45s.
Revival: Restores 50% HP over 5s.

name: Wild Blessing
desc:
Wild Bloom now holds up to 2 charges.
Wild Bloom's Energy cost -15%.

name: Regeneration Bud
desc: Normal attacks have a 10% fixed chance to gain 1 Regen Bud.

name: Pulse Duality
desc: When actively Casting Regen Pulse, it will spread twice consecutively.

name: Bud to Blossom
desc: When a Flower Stalk is generated, gain 1 Regen Bud every 2s for 8s.

name: Verdant Duet
desc: Life Bloom has a fixed 20% chance to heal 1 additional time.

name: Life Bloom
desc: After Casting Blossom Charge, the next Life Bloom is enhanced, eliminating the Casting time and increasing healing by 50%.

name: Full Bloom
desc: Casting Life Bloom grants a fixed 50% chance to reduce the remaining CD of Blossom Charge and Regen Pulse by 2s.

name: Nourish Essence
desc: When Life Bloom generates healing, 50% chance to apply Nourish.

name: Transcendence
desc: For every 200 self-heals from Nourish, gain Transcendence.

name: Healing Infusion
desc: After casting Life Bloom 5 times, your next healing Expertise Skill will have its healing +100%.

name: Lifeforce Extension
desc: Increases the Healing of Healing Chain by 10%. For every 7% Mastery, Healing Chain jumps an additional time.

name: Lifebind Spec
desc:
Replace Special Attack with Life Bloom and enhances the skill.
Life Bloom generates 20% more healing.
Casting Life Bloom grants 1 additional Regen Bud.

Whenever safety allows, aim to cast as many healing skills as possible. Haste increases cast speed, and Mastery enhances healing potency.

name: Vitality
desc:
Nourish can stack up to 5 layers.
Each time Life Bloom is cast, targets affected by the Nourish effect gain 1 layer of Nourish.

name: Flower Time Dance
desc: Every 45s, generate 1 Flower Stalk in the order of Crimson True Sight, Golden Devotion, Moonlight Solace.

name: Verdant Root
desc:
While in battle state, standing still for 2s creates a Grass Domain.
Grass Domain: While inside, your Haste +10%. Upon exiting, the Grass Domain disappears and your movement speed +50% for 0.5s.

name: Gift of Life
desc: When an enemy within 10 meters that you have attacked is defeated, a Healing Orb is generated, occurring up to once every 2s.

name: Inspire and Strengthen
desc: The Inspire effect additionally provides 30 points of Intellect, Strength, Agility, and Endurance.

name: Wings of Revival
desc:
When an ally within 20 meters takes DMG exceeding 30% of their HP, Revival triggers, which can affect the same target up to once every 45s.
Revival: Restores 50% HP over 5s.

name: Flowers Ascension
desc: When Wild Seed deals DMG or Nourishing Seed generates healing, you gain a 10% Forest bonus for the next 8s.

name: Smite Spec
desc:
Further enhances Wild Bloom.
Wild Bloom, Regen Pulse, and Nature Ward now apply Symbiotic Mark to allied targets.
Symbiotic Mark: All of your DMG will heal allies with Symbiotic Mark for 20% of the DMG dealt, lasting for 10s.

name: Final Bloomwheel
desc: When Wild Bloom triggers a Lucky Strike, it reduces the remaining CD of Infusion by 3s.

name: Healing Breath
desc: When a Special Attack, Expertise Skill, or Ultimate generates healing, there is a 20% chance to trigger Healing Chain. For every 2% Luck, the chance +1%.

name: Nature Shield
desc:
When Wild Bloom heals a target, it also applies Nature Shield to them.
Targets with Nature Shield restore HP when hit, with the amount equal to 10% of your ATK. This effect can occur up to once per second.

name: Inspiration
desc: Grants Inspiration to yourself and allies within 30 meters.

name: Intellect Conversion
desc: Every <style="accent-gn">10</style> points of Intellect provides <style="accent-gn">1</style> point of MATK.

name: Breath of Buds
desc: Increases the cap of Regen Buds by 4.

name: Regen Bud
desc:
Casting a Special Attack grants 1 Regen Bud.

Initial cap of Regen Buds: 4.
When an Expertise Skill or Ultimate generates healing, 2 Regen Buds are consumed to throw a Nourishing Seed, triggering up to once per second.
When an Expertise Skill or Ultimate deals DMG, 2 Regen Buds are consumed to shoot a Wild Seed, occurring up to once per second.

name: Defensive Blessing
desc: Inspiration additionally grants the target 100 Armor.

name: Flame Pursuit
desc: After using 3 Special Attacks, the next Basic Attack hit triggers Flame Pillar Blast.

name: Heat Boost
desc: When Intellect reaches 500, the Performance Energy cap +20%.

name: Melody: Heat Core
desc: Melody heals ally targets below 50% HP with 100% bonus effect.

name: Flame Pursuit II
desc: Flame Pillar Blast becomes a two-hit combo.

name: Trio Rhapsody
desc:
Rhapsody of Flame always appears in its most powerful form.
While in Rhapsody of Flame, healing +20%.

name: Severed Chapter
desc: Each time Fierce Strike deals DMG, there's a fixed 50% chance to reset Harmonic Anthem's CD (which can only be triggers once on multiple hits).

name: Healing Note
desc:
Basic Attacks become a two-hit combo.
For every 5 Soundwave Energy obtained, creates a Note for the Ally with the lowest HP.

name: Swing Reflux
desc: Hitting a target with Fierce Strike recovers 3 Performance Energy. Each additional target hit provides 1 extra Performance Energy, up to 10 total.

name: Sound Blaze
desc:
Gains 1 Soundwave Energy each time you deal DMG equal to 10 times ATK.
When consuming Performance Passion, launches Fireball that consumes all Soundwave Energy. Each 1 point of Soundwave Energy increases Fireball DMG by 20%.

name: Arcane Ascension
desc: Special Attack costs -1 less Performance Passion.
